# KitchenSync P4 partition table — 16 MB: # The P4-NANO's flash chip is 16 MB (confirmed by `esptool.py flash_id`:

device 4018). The build previously assumed the ESP-IDF 4 MB
which squeezed the built-in two_ota table's app slots to 1 MB each --

# KitchenSync P4 partition table — 16 MB: # and the app had grown to 0xf5f40 (96% full)
so the next feature would not fit.

# KitchenSync P4 partition table — 16 MB: # nvs / otadata / phy_init keep the EXACT offsets of the old built-in table
# (0x9000 / 0xd000 / 0xf000) so the saved config + WiFi credentials in NVS
# survive this repartition. Only the app region past 0x10000 changes.
# No factory slot: both app slots are equal-purpose OTA targets
# picks "the other" slot and boots into it on success).
# 0x10000 + 2 * 0x400000 = 0x810000 (8.06 MB) used; ~7.9 MB left unallocated for
# future use (SPIFFS/LittleFS). App slots must stay 64 KB-aligned.
